sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22779" key="grammodidaskali/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γραμμο-δῐδασκᾰλίδης</orth>, <sense id="n22779.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">γραμματοδιδάσκαλος</ref></xr>, in contempt, Timo <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4083.tlg001:51" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">51</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
